content:
🌟 caesium-app-web | JavaScript
🎯 Primary Use Case: Compressing images offline and in the browser while maintaining user privacy.
✨ Key Features: • JPG, PNG and WebP supported • Lossy and lossless compression • Keeps images metadata • Before/after comparison • Runs entirely on your browser, no images are uploaded or processed on any external server
📖 Summary: Caesium Web Image Compressor is a privacy-focused, offline web application that compresses images directly in the browser using WebAssembly. It supports various image formats and compression types, ensuring no data is uploaded to external servers.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
